items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the specific feature 'Postage class selection', which is explicitly listed as a need in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms the existence or functionality of this feature. The prior steps focus on customer interactions and booking processes, but do not include any evidence related to postage class selection, indicating a gap in coverage for this requirement.
